canonical_modules.run_byon.py: REAL-mode launcher: starts memory-service child + Gateway + UI; LocalBYONBackend forbidden in REAL
canonical_modules.gateway/app.py: FastAPI Gateway: the only public surface; no raw memory/engine exposure; final audit enforced
canonical_modules.gateway/epistemic_search.py: epistemic search loop (memory -> project files -> Claude hypothesis -> external-LLM advisory -> web -> corpus -> budget); relation context injection; sufficiency-gated acquisition escalation
canonical_modules.gateway/acquisition/: Cycle 13.3 additive evidence-acquisition package: EvidencePacket + source adapters (project_files, corpus, external_llm advisory, budget) + sufficiency-gated orchestrator + acquisition_policy.json. NOT a parallel engine; supplies evidence the existing synthesis/verdict logic decides over. external-LLM/model-prior packets are advisory only and never become KNOWN; a budget request yields BUDGET_REQUIRED instead of a fabricated answer.
canonical_modules.gateway/source_policy.py: query_class + source_class gating; canonical constraints; the source-bleed boundary
canonical_modules.gateway/consistent_client.py: read-consistent client wrapper over the memory-service (tombstone-filtered)
canonical_modules.gateway/candidate_lifecycle.py: candidate-to-commit lifecycle; consolidation is the only state-mover
canonical_modules.gateway/lifeloop.py: LifeLoop v2: internal circulation; never answers the user; never a truth authority
canonical_modules.gateway/relation_field.py: relational memory field: entities + typed relations; decay; never a truth authority
canonical_modules.gateway/relation_policy.py: relation-type source policy (objective relations need verified sources)
canonical_modules.gateway/relation_inference.py: grounded relation inference (deterministic + canonical + opt-in Claude advisory)
canonical_modules.gateway/relation_reports.py: relation reports + grounded path explanation + relation-aware answer context
canonical_modules.gateway/vault_training.py: vault indexing into the canonical memory-service (single-writer, dedup, coherent report)
canonical_modules.scripts/live_byon_eval.py: live evaluation harness (178 graded gates across cycles 1-13)

relation_intelligence.gateway/relation_path_score.py: Cycle 15 TRACK F: per-hop path_score (edge_weights, bottleneck, status/decay/source/length penalties, weakest-condition path status) replacing min-edge-weight; pure/load-free; wired into RelationField._path_obj
relation_intelligence.gateway/relation_reports.py:render_path_: Cycle 15 TRACK G: grounded path explanation v2 (bottleneck, KNOWN/PROVISIONAL/DISPUTED + why, confidence propagation, per-hop source, next action when weak)
relation_intelligence.gateway/relation_reports.py:relation_sel: Cycle 15 TRACK H: relation-aware self-state (auto-repaired, weakened, gaps, repair tasks, weak paths, central nodes needing sources); read-only, never truth authority
relation_intelligence.gateway/relation_maintenance.py: Cycle 15 TRACK B: scheduled relation decay maintenance (never deletes/commits; canonical resists, disputed/candidate decay faster) + build_gap_acquisition_context() (repo_root/corpus/external-LLM for gap-repair)
relation_intelligence.gateway/relation_task_results.py: Cycle 15 TRACK E: gap-repair task-result ingestion as candidates (evidence->candidate/reinforce, contradiction->disputed challenger, nothing->unresolved); never commits; wired into the live autorun path
relation_intelligence.gateway/lifeloop.py: Cycle 15 TRACK C: tick runs scheduled relation maintenance + gap scan + bounded autorun (BYON_RELATION_* env), skipped when memory-service down; never answers the user
relation_intelligence.gap_repair_routing: Cycle 15 TRACK D: gap-repair evidence-finding runs ONLY through the existing 13.3 acquisition phase in EpistemicSearch.run, reached via lifeloop_run_task -> backend.research(acquisition_context=...) -> search.run; no parallel acquisition path
relation_intelligence.relation_maintenance_endpoints: Cycle 15 TRACK I (Gateway-only): GET maintenance/status, POST maintenance/run, GET gaps, POST gaps/scan, GET path-score, GET task-results under /v1/lifeloop/relation-field/
relation_intelligence.live_gates: Cycle 15 TRACK J: Harness._cycle15_suite (25 graded live gates) in scripts/live_byon_eval.py

diagnostics_scripts.scripts/check_live_stack.py: Cycle 14 S1: pre-flight live-stack health check (Gateway + memory-service + writer lock + relation/lifeloop endpoints); exit 0-5; writes runtime/diagnostics/live_stack_health.{json,md}
diagnostics_scripts.scripts/monitor_memory_service.py: Cycle 14 S2: memory-service crash monitor with RSS/CPU/FD resource time-series; memory liveness derived only from the memory probe, never the Gateway
diagnostics_scripts.scripts/reproduce_memory_service_crash.p: Cycle 14 S4: crash reproduction outside the harness (modes search/relation/lifeloop/store-read/mixed/acquisition-store incl. store_batch)
diagnostics_scripts.docs/CYCLE14_MEMORY_SERVICE_ROOT_CAUSE.m: Cycle 14 S7: root-cause writeup (pipe-deadlock excluded for the canonical launch path; mechanism proven; live 240-iter sustained-load no-crash)

stability_supervision.app/service_supervisor.py: Cycle 14 S5: child output to SEPARATE pipe-safe file handles (never an unread subprocess.PIPE); process diagnostics (PID/command/redacted-env/exit-code); bounded opt-in autorestart (default OFF) that marks the run unstable
stability_supervision.gateway degraded-state: Cycle 14 S6: memory_service_up() guard; /v1/chat and /v1/research return ERROR when memory-service is down (no fabrication, no Claude/local fallback in REAL); /v1/health + /v1/memory/status report memory_service_up
stability_supervision.live_byon_eval ServiceHealthGuard: Cycle 14 S3: pre-flight + per-gate memory-service health poll; a crash is MEMORY_SERVICE_CRASH (not misclassified) and halts the run; records last_successful_gate + health trace

external_dependencies.byon_optimus_orchestrator: github.com/NEURALMORPHIC-FIELDS/byon_optimus, consumed at runtime under external/ (not vendored)
external_dependencies.fcem_v15_7a: sealed FCE-M consolidator resolved via FCEM_MEMORY_ENGINE_ROOT; not bundled; mandatory for release validation
external_dependencies.memory_service: canonical FastAPI + FAISS + trust tiers + FCE-M; the ONLY store; never bypassed

boundaries.memory_service_FCEM_DCortex: accessed only through the canonical client/backend; no raw FAISS/FCE-M/D_Cortex endpoints are exposed
boundaries.gateway_only_public_surface: all external access goes through gateway/app.py /v1/* with mandatory user_id+session_id, per-user namespace, audit trace, and final audit
boundaries.ui: the UI calls the Gateway client only, never memory-service or Claude directly

forbidden_duplicates: no second epistemic_search / source_policy / memory_service_backend / candidate_lifecycle / relation_field
no parallel vector store besides the canonical memory-service
no copy of a canonical module (verify_integration.py flags byte-identical copies as DUPLICATE)

sealed_or_closed.dcortex/: v10.0 milestone code, CLOSED; logic/control-flow/constants never modified. Cycle 13.2 hygiene applied header+em-dash edits ONLY (comments/docstrings) per the sealed-tree exception.
sealed_or_closed.orchestration/: adapter shims onto BYON; Cycle 13.2 hygiene applied header+em-dash edits ONLY; now in the style-contract widened scan
sealed_or_closed.integrations/: external-world connectors (forward-only onto BYON); Cycle 13.2 hygiene applied header+em-dash edits ONLY; now in the style-contract widened scan
sealed_or_closed.external/: sealed/vendored at runtime; not scanned or modified

release_hygiene..mailmap: canonical author identity (Vasile Lucian Borbeleac <lucianborbeleac@gmail.com>); maps historical/alternate commit identities; local git user.name/user.email set to match
release_hygiene.style_contract_scope: scripts/check_style_contract.py em-dash + copyright-header scan now covers owned source/docs AND the sealed/adapter trees dcortex/, orchestration/, integrations/ (no type-hint requirement on the sealed/adapter trees); positive-Level-3-claim and FULL_LEVEL3_NOT_DECLARED-marker checks remain repo-wide
release_hygiene.type_hint_coverage: owned source (gateway/, app/, byon_mcp/, scripts/, run_byon.py, run_alpha_app.py) at 100.0 with PEP 563 'from __future__ import annotations'
release_hygiene.import_style: owned packages use absolute imports only (0 relative)

verification: python verify_integration.py (all critical modules WIRED, no boundary violation) + python scripts/check_style_contract.py (widened scan covers owned + dcortex/orchestration/integrations)
